title: Ubiquiti UISP-Switch-Plus
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Switches / PoE Switches
description: Ubiquiti Switch Plus is a powerful PoE switch designed for both home and office. There are 4 LAN ports with speeds up to 2.5 Gbps and passive 27V PoE output. The optical interface will offer 4 SFP+ ports with speeds up to 10 Gbps . A total of 160 W PoE budget is available. Interesting features of the switch include port isolation, speed limit setting, or DHCP snooping . The switch also has two power supplies, one of which is in the form of a TransPort , designed as a backup DC power supply in… PoE budget 160 W 4 LAN ports with speeds up to 2.5 Gbps 4 SFP+ ports up to 10 Gbps DHCP snooping, port isolation, per-port speed settings Redundant power supply option Configurable via UISP application Device Power cord (AC) RJ45 cable Rack mounting kit
